name: Rose Gold Diamond Solitaire Ring
description: A breathtaking solitaire ring crafted in 18K rose gold, featuring a brilliant-cut diamond that catches light from every angle. The minimalist band design lets the center stone take center stage, making it perfect for engagements or special milestones.

name: Sterling Silver Infinity Necklace
description: Elegant sterling silver necklace with a delicate infinity pendant adorned with sparkling cubic zirconia stones. A timeless symbol of eternal love and friendship, this piece transitions effortlessly from day to night.

name: Gold Plated Kundan Jhumka Earrings
description: Exquisite traditional Kundan jhumka earrings with intricate gold plating and colorful enamel work. These statement earrings feature a dome-shaped top with dangling beaded tassels, perfect for weddings and festive occasions.

name: Diamond Tennis Bracelet — 14K White Gold
description: A classic tennis bracelet featuring a continuous line of prong-set round brilliant diamonds in 14K white gold. This iconic piece adds elegant sparkle to any outfit and is designed for both everyday luxury and formal occasions.

name: Traditional Gold Plated Bangles Set (Pack of 4)
description: A stunning set of four gold-plated bangles featuring intricate hand-carved designs inspired by Rajasthani artistry. Each bangle showcases detailed filigree work and red-green enamel accents.

name: Pearl Drop Pendant with Chain
description: A refined freshwater pearl pendant elegantly cradled in a sterling silver setting with a delicate chain. The lustrous pearl adds a touch of sophistication to any ensemble, making it ideal for office wear and special dinners.

name: Silver Anklet with Ghungroo Charms
description: A charming pair of sterling silver anklets featuring delicate ghungroo (bell) charms that produce a soft, musical jingle with every step. Adjustable chain ensures a perfect fit for all ankle sizes.

name: Gold Mangalsutra with Black Beads
description: A beautifully designed mangalsutra featuring a contemporary pendant in 22K gold with traditional black beads. The elegant design merges modern aesthetics with cultural significance, perfect for daily wear.

name: Emerald Cut Moissanite Ring — 925 Silver
description: A stunning emerald-cut moissanite ring set in 925 sterling silver with a halo of micro-pavé stones. This lab-grown gemstone offers diamond-like brilliance at a fraction of the cost, making luxury accessible.

name: Layered Gold Chain Necklace
description: A chic layered necklace featuring three delicate chains of varying lengths in 18K gold plating. The minimalist design with small coin and bar pendants creates a stylish, contemporary look for everyday elegance.

name: Swarovski Crystal Stud Earrings
description: Brilliant Swarovski crystal studs set in sterling silver with a four-prong setting. These versatile earrings offer exceptional sparkle and are hypoallergenic, making them suitable for sensitive ears.

name: Rose Gold Charm Bracelet with Heart Lock
description: A romantic charm bracelet in rose gold plating featuring a heart-shaped lock charm, star, and moon pendants. The adjustable chain makes it a perfect gift for someone special.

name: Antique Gold Temple Bangles (Pack of 6)
description: A majestic set of six temple-style bangles with antique gold finish featuring divine motifs and intricate detailing inspired by South Indian temple architecture. Perfect for wedding trousseaus and festive celebrations.

name: Evil Eye Diamond Pendant — 14K Gold
description: A protective evil eye pendant crafted in 14K solid gold with genuine blue sapphire center and diamond accents. This meaningful talisman combines spiritual significance with luxurious craftsmanship.

name: Boho Silver Ankle Bracelet with Turquoise
description: A bohemian-style anklet featuring natural turquoise beads and tiny silver charms on a delicate chain. This free-spirited piece brings a touch of wanderlust to beach days and summer outfits.

name: Contemporary Diamond Mangalsutra — 18K Gold
description: A modern reinterpretation of the traditional mangalsutra with a sleek diamond-studded pendant in 18K white and yellow gold. Designed for the contemporary bride who values both tradition and style.

name: Amethyst Cocktail Ring — Gold Vermeil
description: A bold statement cocktail ring featuring a large cushion-cut amethyst surrounded by white topaz pavé in gold vermeil. This eye-catching piece commands attention at parties and formal events.

name: Polki Choker Necklace Set
description: A regal Polki choker necklace set featuring uncut diamonds in a gold-plated setting with matching jhumka earrings. This bridal favorite showcases traditional Mughal-era craftsmanship.

name: Platinum Love Bands — Couple Set
description: A pair of matching platinum love bands with a brushed matte finish and a single channel-set diamond on each. These timeless couple rings symbolize an unbreakable bond and are perfect for anniversaries.

name: Pearl and Crystal Drop Earrings
description: Graceful drop earrings combining lustrous freshwater pearls with brilliant crystal accents in a sterling silver setting. These versatile earrings add instant elegance to both casual and formal attire.

name: Oxidized Silver Tribal Cuff Bracelet
description: A bold oxidized silver cuff bracelet with hand-engraved tribal motifs. This adjustable statement piece draws inspiration from northeastern Indian tribal art and pairs beautifully with both Western and Indo-Western outfits.

name: Kundan Pendant Set with Earrings
description: An ornate Kundan pendant set with matching drop earrings featuring red and green stone embellishments on a gold-plated base. This regal set is perfect for weddings, receptions, and traditional celebrations.

name: Toe Ring Set — Sterling Silver (Pack of 5)
description: A delightful collection of five sterling silver toe rings with varied designs including floral, braided, and stone-studded patterns. Adjustable sizing ensures a comfortable fit for any toe.

name: 22K Gold Chain — Rope Design
description: A classic rope-design chain crafted in 22K hallmarked gold with a BIS certification. This versatile chain can be worn alone for a minimalist look or paired with your favorite pendant for added elegance.
